name: Blender Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Put in the blender container: egg, mustard, salt, cayenne, sugar, and olive oil.
2. Cover and blend on high until thoroughly combined.
3. With the blender still running, remove the cover and slowly add 1/2 cup vegetable oil, then the lemon juice until thoroughly blended.
4. Add the remaining vegetable oil slowly and continue blending until thick. You may have to stop and start the blender to stir down the mixture.
5. Yields 1-3/4 cups.
